title: PosX_Polarity Property
see_also:
Applies To

Force Motion Restriction Object FMR#

Comments

This returns the status of or sets whether the force motion restriction is activated for position of specified

axis by the value being either within the thresholds or outside of the thresholds.
examples:
Function SettingPolarity FSet FMR1.PosEnabled, True, False, False, False, False FSet FMR1.PosX_Polarity, FG_OUT FSet FMR1.PosX_Levels, -500, 500 Trap 1, FMR1 Call ForceError
Fend
